title: Fig. 3 in Differential analysis of the cytochrome p450 acaricide-resistance genes in Panonychus citri (Trombidiformes: Tetranychidae) strains
author: Jiang, Gaofei
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Quantitative Real-time PCR analysis of CYPs in Panonychus citri between the hexythiazox-resistant (RR) and susceptible (SS) strains. The numbers of genes down-regulated and up-regulated in the RR relative to the SS are indicated above or below the X axis. The light or dark gray was susceptible strain and resistant strain, respectively.
steps_raw: Fig. 3. Quantitative Real-time PCR analysis of CYPs in Panonychus citri between the hexythiazox-resistant (RR) and susceptible (SS) strains. The numbers of genes down-regulated and up-regulated in the RR relative to the SS are indicated above or below the X axis. The light or dark gray was susceptible strain and resistant strain, respectively.
